text: Stepping through the glass doors, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The world transforms into a canvas of innovation and inquiry. Inside, the vibrant walls and the bold 'R+D' lettering awaken a feeling of excitement in me—this is a space dedicated to experimentation and exploration, a celebration of human ingenuity. Surrounded by thought-provoking displays, I am reminded how our desire to understand and improve binds us together, compelling us to push boundaries and connect our present to possible futures. I feel both humbled and invigorated, aware of my small place in the continuing story of human creativity.
